summary: Comprehensive testing of Model Leaderboard feature (iteration 31). All backend API tests (8/8) and frontend UI tests passed. The leaderboard feature is fully functional including auto-save after training, stats row, ranked table with filters/sorting, delete single entry, clear all, and dashboard widget with View All navigation.

issues: Minor React warning: validateDOMNesting - div cannot appear as descendant of p (in Badge component) - cosmetic only, non-blocking

passed_tests: 1. Backend: POST /api/leaderboard - save a leaderboard entry (requires auth token) - PASS
2. Backend: GET /api/leaderboard - fetch all leaderboard entries for a user - PASS
3. Backend: DELETE /api/leaderboard/{model_id} - delete specific entry - PASS
4. Backend: DELETE /api/leaderboard - clear all entries - PASS
5. Frontend: Login and navigate to Leaderboard tab - shows empty state with 'Train Your First Model' button - PASS
6. Frontend: Navigate to Analysis, upload Loan Approval dataset, select 'approved' target, train model - PASS (Training completed with 100% accuracy)
7. Frontend: Leaderboard page shows stats row (Total Models: 7, Best Score: 100.0%, Avg Score: 83.7%, Algorithms Tried: 7, Total Training: 0.0s) - PASS
8. Frontend: Leaderboard page shows Model Rankings table with sorting/filtering - PASS (7 rows with rank badges, filter by algorithm works, sort dropdown works)
9. Frontend: Dashboard page shows 'All-Time Leaderboard' widget with top 5 models - PASS
10. Frontend: Leaderboard delete button removes an entry (7→6 rows), Clear All button removes all entries (shows empty state) - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: LeaderboardView.js is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Stats row correctly calculates Total Models, Best Score, Average Score, Algorithms Tried, Total Training Time
Ranked table shows proper rank badges (1st with trophy, 2nd, 3rd) and all model details
Filter by algorithm and sort by score/date/time work correctly
Algorithm Distribution bar chart shows average scores and model counts
Dashboard widget shows top 5 models with 'View All' navigation
Delete single entry and Clear All functionality work correctly
Auto-save to leaderboard after training works correctly via POST /api/leaderboard
Backend properly excludes MongoDB _id from responses
All leaderboard endpoints require authentication (401 for unauthorized)
seed_data_creation: Used Loan Approval sample dataset (20 rows), trained models using Auto mode which trained: Logistic Regression, Naive Bayes, Random Forest, KNN, SVM, Decision Tree, Baseline
context_for_next_testing_agent: Model Leaderboard feature fully tested and working. Key data-testids: leaderboard-view, stat-total-models, stat-best-score, stat-avg-score, stat-algos-tried, stat-total-time, leaderboard-table-card, leaderboard-table, lb-row-0/1/2, filter-algo, filter-type, sort-select, clear-leaderboard-btn, lb-delete-0, algo-distribution-card, dashboard-leaderboard-widget, view-full-leaderboard, lb-widget-0, go-train-btn. Training button is 'start-training-btn'. Training is client-side JavaScript (5-25 seconds). After training, models are auto-saved to /api/leaderboard endpoint. The Leaderboard tab fetches from this API on mount. Sample datasets use data-testid='sample-dataset-0' for Loan Approval.

leaderboard_view.stats_row: PASS - Shows Total Models, Best Score, Average Score, Algorithms Tried, Total Training Time
leaderboard_view.ranked_table: PASS - Shows rank badges (1st/2nd/3rd), algorithm names, dataset, type, score, accuracy, time, date, delete button
leaderboard_view.filter_by_algorithm: PASS - Dropdown filters table by selected algorithm
leaderboard_view.filter_by_type: PASS - Dropdown filters table by problem type
leaderboard_view.sort_dropdown: PASS - Sorts by Best Score First, Worst Score First, Newest First, Oldest First, Fastest Training, Slowest Training
leaderboard_view.algo_distribution_chart: PASS - Shows average scores and model counts per algorithm
leaderboard_view.delete_single_entry: PASS - Trash icon deletes individual entry (7→6 rows)
leaderboard_view.clear_all: PASS - Clear All button removes all entries (shows empty state)

dashboard_widget.widget_display: PASS - Shows 'All-Time Leaderboard' with top 5 models
dashboard_widget.view_all_navigation: PASS - 'View All' button navigates to full Leaderboard tab

auto_save.after_training: PASS - Models automatically saved to leaderboard after training completes

backend_api.POST /api/leaderboard: PASS - Saves model entry with auth
backend_api.GET /api/leaderboard: PASS - Returns all entries for user with auth
backend_api.DELETE /api/leaderboard/{model_id}: PASS - Deletes single entry with auth
backend_api.DELETE /api/leaderboard: PASS - Clears all entries with auth
backend_api.Unauthorized access: PASS - All endpoints return 401 without auth
